name: Mio Chunks Adult Cat Liver 400g
shortDescription: Mio Chunks Adult Cat Liver 400 g is a nutritious wet food designed for adult cats, featuring tasty liver chunks in savory gravy that supports a healthy immune system and muscle maintenance .
description: Product Description and Benefits This cat food contains a high proportion of liver as a primary ingredient, providing rich, protein-packed nutrition essential for adult cats. It is formulated to support your cat’s overall vitality, including: Strong immune system support through high-quality protein and essential nutrients. Muscle health maintenance with balanced vitamins and minerals. Rich in taurine and iron , nutrients crucial for feline heart and eye health. The soft chunks in gravy make it a flavorful and easy-to-eat meal for your cat. Ingredients & Nutritional Composition Common ingredients seen in similar liver cat foods include: Meat and animal derivatives with a significant liver content (e.g., 40%). Fish oil and vegetable oils contributing beneficial fatty acids like Omega-6. Added vitamins and minerals to ensure a complete and balanced diet. Feeding Instructions & Storage Feed approximately one 400 g can per adult cat daily, ideally split into two separate meals. Always provide fresh water alongside meals. Store unopened cans in a cool, dry place. Refrigerate any opened portion and consume within 2 days to maintain freshness. Avoid feeding if the can is dented or swollen and check the expiration date on the lid.
